summary: CI regression (sqlite-migrations v5 test) fixed on main. Two tests patched: migration assertion and go-fast-path flakiness. PRs #1151 and #1153 should now pass CI on re-run. PR #1152 superseded. Multiple dogfood false-positive issues remain open (P1).

agentGuard.detail: Migration v5 test regression from #1098 patched (toBe(1)→toBe(2)). go-fast-path flaky test fixed (missing chmodSync). Full suite: 15/15 tasks, 820+243 tests passing.

agentguardCloud.detail: Previous report indicated PR #472 was green. Not re-checked this cycle.
